calibration.calibration_note: Initial V3 estimate. Will be updated from actual run times.

items.title: SD-003 Larger World + 3x3 Observation (r2 — init fix)
items.description: r2: fixes MRO init order (set dims before super().__init__). Tests SD-003 on 12x12 grid with 8 hazards and 3x3 local observation (44% view change per step vs 20% in 5x5). Includes target stopgrad + multi-step E2 + recon loss. PASS: calibration_gap > 0.05.
